description: Mandatory TimesFM preflight: check RAM, GPU/VRAM, disk space, Python version, and timesfm/torch install for the chosen model version; emit a machine-readable verdict (read-only).
rules: read-only — inspects the host only, never loads the model or touches the network
MODEL_VERSION is one of v2.5 (default), v2.0, v1.0
writes the JSON report to record_store as system_check.json
the porter ignores the checker's non-zero FAIL exit; the JSON verdict carries pass/fail
usage: Set MODEL_VERSION (v2.5 | v2.0 | v1.0). Output: system_check.json with per-check status and a recommended per_core_batch_size.
limitation: GPU/VRAM detection needs torch installed; without torch the GPU check reports 'unknown' but does not fail. Pure stdlib otherwise.
